message:
fix(supervision): close region on partial spawn failure (bd-2wds9)

When a required child fails to start in CompiledSupervisor::spawn(),
the region and previously-started children were leaked. Now the region
is closed (begin_close + begin_drain) before returning the error,
preventing orphan tasks.

Also adds `region: RegionId` to SupervisorSpawnError::ChildStartFailed
for caller awareness, and updates the existing test to verify the
region is no longer Open after partial spawn failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
